The '''Battle of Endor Hero's Medal''' was an award given to [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] (and possibly ground forces) of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] was awarded this medal for his valor in the assault against the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].

{{Military-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
